data.name: Space Babes: Busty Hentai Nympho SQUAD
data.detailed_description:
About the Game: Space Babes: Busty Hentai Nympho SQUAD

Welcome to the Space Babes station – a place where all inhibitions are gone, and morality was left back on Earth. This is a world where your dirtiest fantasies become daily reality, and the crew's sole purpose is to bring you absolute satisfaction.

Prepare for the most direct VR experience where you set the rules.

What the Station Offers:

🔥 Interactive Ecstasy & Reactions Here, the girls feel your presence. Watch them react actively to penetration – from loud moans to authentic emotions and expressions of pleasure written on their faces. Every move you make triggers an instant, hot response.

🕹️ Full Control: Manual & Director Mode We give you the tools to take full control of the situation:

  • Manual Dildo: Grab the virtual gear with your own hand. Control the depth, angle, and speed of penetration yourself, feeling full "1-on-1" immersion.

  • Pleasure Director Panel: Prefer to watch? Launch the control panel. Manage automatic toys, change lighting, select music, and create the perfect atmosphere in the quarters where you fulfill your desires.

🎨 Advanced Customization Tailor the partners' appearance to your preferences:

  • Natural: Classic, smooth skin.

  • Galactic Skin: Unique, futuristic textures.

  • Skin Color Selector: You have total freedom – pick exactly the skin shade you desire.

Explore Multiple Pleasure Zones:

The station is full of places made for sin. Discover diverse locations, from the intimate Captain’s Quarters, through the raw Engine Room, to the futuristic Zero-G Chamber, where the lack of gravity allows for acrobatics impossible on Earth. Each room offers a new vibe and new possibilities.

Meet Your Crew (7 Specialists):

Seven women await on board, each with a different role and a different idea on how to use your body:

  • Cmdr. Vesper (Commander): Likes to take initiative and give orders. Discipline rules in her quarters... along with rough sex.

  • Dr. Solara (Medic): Her "examinations" are extremely thorough. She takes care of your anatomy in a very direct way.

  • Roxie (Engineer): Mechanics expert. Loves combining intimacy with heavy equipment and the vibrations of the engine room.

  • Luna (Pilot): Fast and intense. Lives at high speed and expects the same in intimate moments.

  • Vixen (Head of Security): Strong and dominant. With her, you have to earn your pleasure.

  • Astra (Botanist): Surrounded by vegetation in the station garden, she prefers natural, wild instincts.

  • EVE (AI Hologram): Digital perfection in every pixel.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION This game is designed exclusively for adults (18+). It contains strong sexual content, nudity, and interactive erotic scenes. All characters depicted in the game are over the age of 18.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 3060 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
